statement: Current telemetry/debug surfaces are sufficient for canary triage if we add explicit operator gates for telemetry degradation and approximation flags.
rationale: Core signals exist (health, stuck, analyze), but fail-open telemetry and hidden approximation status can mask data-quality degradation.
keyAssumptions: process_request_targets snapshots continue to update correctly
validationCriteria: No canary run with missing sequence integrity or counter mismatch
No unexplained gap between run status and telemetry stage progression
critiquePoints: Fail-open telemetry may hide corruption under high OCC pressure
questions: Should getProcessHealth expose an explicit approximate flag?
